message:
✨ Add CC toggle and audio/subtitle track selector to player control bar (#62)

- Add CC button (closed_caption icon) with tap-to-toggle, long-press for track picker
- Add audio track button with count badge, shown when >1 audio track available
- Add subtitle/audio track picker bottom sheets matching app theme
- Wire track selection to media_kit player API (SubtitleTrack, AudioTrack)
- Auto-load track info when tracks become available via stream listener

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
